summary: Iteration 226: Tested 3 new features - Admin sidebar cleanup (Discount Analytics, Delivery Notes, Purchase Orders), Stripe E2E validation, and Admin risk behavior alert system. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for sidebar navigation, Discount Analytics page with risk alerts, and alert dismiss functionality.

tests: Discount Analytics link visible under Commerce section
Delivery Notes link visible under Operations section
Purchase Orders link visible under Operations section
Navigation to /admin/discount-analytics works correctly
Navigation to /admin/delivery-notes works correctly
Navigation to /admin/procurement/purchase-orders works correctly
POST /api/payments/stripe/checkout/invoice creates checkout session with Stripe URL
GET /api/payments/stripe/checkout/status/{session_id} returns session status
Checkout session returns real Stripe Checkout URL (https://checkout.stripe.com/...)
GET /api/admin/discount-analytics/alerts returns risk behavior alerts
PUT /api/admin/discount-analytics/alerts/{alert_id}/dismiss dismisses alert
Risk alert banner displays on Discount Analytics page
Dismiss button removes alert from UI
Toast notification shows 'Alert dismissed' on successful dismiss

alert_structure_verified.message: Staff Sales User has submitted 3 critical-risk discount requests in the last 7 days

tests: POST /api/staff/discount-requests with mode='preview' returns margin risk preview
Preview mode returns risk_level, max_safe_discount, remaining_margin_after_discount
Preview mode does not create persistent record in DB
GET /api/admin/discount-analytics/kpis returns KPI data
GET /api/admin/discount-analytics/trend returns daily trend data
GET /api/admin/discount-analytics/sales-behavior returns sales rep behavior
GET /api/admin/discount-analytics/high-risk returns risky orders
GET /api/admin/discount-analytics/top-products returns top discounted products

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features (sidebar cleanup, Stripe E2E, admin risk alerts) are working correctly. The risk alert (DRA-20260409-E6FC6B) was dismissed during testing - a new alert will be created when staff submits 3+ critical discount requests within 7 days. Staff login works with staff@konekt.co.tz / Staff123!. DocumentFooterSection was verified in iteration 225.
